title: On Holding (ONON) Stock Is a Home Run, Says Bank of America
text: Bank of America analysts called On Holding (ONON) stock a home run, expressing strong conviction in the company's growth prospects and execution. Both Bank of America and UBS reiterated Buy ratings and lifted their price targets on the shares. UBS raised its price target to $73 per share, up from $65 previously, implying about 40% upside from the time of the analyst action. The bullish analyst sentiment reflected confidence in On's brand momentum, international growth potential, and operating leverage as the company scales. Margin expansion and strong DTC growth were cited as key value drivers. The analyst enthusiasm supported strong equity market performance for the stock following earnings releases.
